name: Sealwalker's Pendant
description: Carved from the Deepwalker's shed tooth. Script on surface readable only by Kerra. Warms when held near an unrecognized Witness.
effect: Pass between companions in populated areas — it will find who it's looking for.

name: The Impossible Flower
description: Pressed between glass, sealed with wax. Grows only below, near the Verath Ohn chamber. Pulled up in a fishing net years ago.
effect: Heals damage that cannot otherwise be healed. One use, then gone.

name: The Glass Sphere
description: Left by the Observatory presence in Mast's locked chest. Finds things that actively avoid observation, but only through peripheral vision.
effect: Reveals things that avoid observation — peripheral vision only.
notes: Lenn has already developed an intuitive relationship with it.

name: The Measuring Rods
description: Cuppin Tevoulle's instrument. Measures something called presence depth.
effect: Bearing consistently northeast — toward the Eldest's valley.
notes: Jaygar developing intuition for them without fully understanding them.

name: Greyback Hide
description: Raw hide from the Greyback. The below confirmed it carries below-substance and will accept influence.
effect: Being worked into armor or items.
notes: In progress — not yet a finished item.

name: Greyback Claws
description: Claws from the Greyback.
effect: Useful to northern smiths.

name: Varath Salve
description: Three vials of rendered Greyback fat.
effect: Grants resistance to cold damage for one hour per vial.

name: Mast's Research Documents
description: Eleven years of boundary work. Chamber locations including four previously unknown, approach maps for the north, correspondence connecting Calvane to Argentveil operations.
effect: Intelligence asset. Four new chamber locations.

name: Third Orvath Account Documents
description: Found in Mast's research. A third Syndicate account in Orvath beyond the two Thorne disclosed. Different account structure, different access method.
effect: Unknown — needs investigation.
notes: Different from the Thorne accounts. Access method not yet determined.

name: Ring of Necrotic Resistance
description: Simple ring.
effect: Resistance to necrotic damage while attuned.

name: Hendvar's Enchanting Tools
description: Portable enchanting station — a toolkit rather than a fixed station.

name: Laboratory Diagram
description: Self-sustaining power source research.

name: First Breath Vial
description: Unknown purpose.
effect: Unknown.

name: Hendvar's Spellbook (Lenn's copy)
description: Hendvar's personal spellbook. Shared with Lyria for spell extraction.
effect: Spell extraction.

name: Hendvar's Spellbook (Lyria's copy)
description: Hendvar's personal spellbook. Shared with Lenn for spell extraction.
effect: Spell extraction.

name: Lyria's Contract
description: Lyria keeps this.

name: Whetstone of Keen Edge
description: Sharpening whetstone.
effect: 1/rest.

name: Everlasting Blue Candles
description: Candles that do not burn down.

name: Regional Maps
description: Northern Reaches and campaign region.
effect: Valuable for northern campaign.

name: Necrotic Essence Containers
description: Sealed necrotic essence containers.
effect: Unknown.
notes: Left in Millhaven. Find a responsible institution when relevant. Do not open.

name: Seal Compass
description: Small circular compass-shaped object with 8 points, each filled with a kind of vapor.
effect: Allows perceptualization of all eight seals across the continent and remote tending. Quality of remote tending is meaningful but not equivalent to physical presence.

name: Boots of the Tireless North
description: Soft leather, northern make, clan stitching along the ankle. Worn looking but perfectly preserved. Sized for small feet.
effect: No movement penalties in difficult terrain (snow, ice, mud, rubble). Travel pace never causes exhaustion regardless of distance covered in a day.

name: Northern Recurve Bow
description: Compact recurve hunting bow, northern construction. Viable from horseback or tight terrain. Luminescent bowstring, pulls smooth and silent.
effect: Three accompanying arrows of dark dense northern metal (same as the elder's axe). Arrows return to quiver after a successful hit only — not after a miss.
notes: Siv recognized immediately it wasn't for her. Vrethka's spear now feels transitional rather than permanent.

name: True Journal
description: Blank pages — cannot be written in deliberately. Cover worked with a pattern Kerra read immediately without being asked.
effect: Records automatically whatever the bearer witnesses that is genuinely true — not believed to be true, actually true. Only truth gets in.
notes: No one else in the party has processed what this means for someone with Kerra's history, her patron, and her years of reading things she shouldn't.

name: Blackwood Wand Focus
description: Blackwood wand usable as a spellcasting focus.
effect: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.

name: Ravine Stalker Hide
description: Darker and denser than Greyback hide. Likely carries below-substance given the boundary thinness at the kill site.
effect: Priority material for crafting. Below-substance properties probable.

name: Ravine Stalker Claws
description: Cutting claws — sharper than Greyback, better quality. Vrethka said these cut rather than grip.
effect: Superior to Greyback claws as tool material for northern smiths.

name: Ravine Stalker Jaw Bones
description: Unusual wide crushing jaw configuration.
effect: Unknown. Jaygar has a theory, not sharing yet.

name: Ravine Stalker Rendered Fat
description: Less yield than the Greybacks but present.
effect: Cold resistance properties probable — similar to Varath Salve.

name: Ravine Stalker Eyes
description: One set of eyes from the largest Stalker. Absorbs light rather than reflects it.
effect: Unknown. Jaygar specifically requested these and is not ready to explain yet.
notes: Set of two eyes, from the largest individual.

name: Helm of Brilliance Buckle
description: Chinstrap buckle from a Helm of Brilliance.
effect: Can be reconstructed into a functional Helm of Brilliance with the right smith.

name: Fabrication Project — Missing Components
description: Outstanding sourcing requirement to complete dismantling of a 40-year-old self-sustaining magical automation system.
effect: 60% of required tools already in hand. Missing: copper grounding coil (minimum 18 inches), two ceramic insulating brackets, one resonance dampener.
notes: None of these are exotic. Sourceable in any city with a decent artificer supply or engineering merchant. Argentveil or Khemrise most likely.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Tielle
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Vrethka
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Vaz / Kern
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Marcus
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Ledwent
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Gaelestrasz
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Casvath
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Coalbeard
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Tielle / Harwick
description: Paired sending stones.
effect: Cast Sending between holders once per day.

name: Sending Stones — Unpaired (x2)
description: Two unpaired short-distance sending stones.
effect: Short distance only. No paired counterpart yet.

name: Short-Distance Mirror Set
description: Paired mirrors for short-distance communication.
effect: Visual communication only — no audio.
